name: composer-swarm
description: Cheap fast Cursor Composer scouts for marginal-value work.

interface.shortDescription: Cheap fast Composer scouts your main agent fans out marginal work to.
interface.longDescription: Three Cursor Composer scouts — composer-wide-search, composer-deep-search, composer-runner — that take sub-tasks the main agent doesn't want to spend its own tokens on. Each scout takes a budget hint (quick/thorough/exhaustive) and returns a structured report with an adjacent-surprises footer that flags 1-3 things the main agent didn't ask about. Read-only by default; runner has shell access for one named command.
defaultPrompt: Use composer-wide-search to map this subsystem, budget thorough.
Use composer-deep-search to trace this behavior end-to-end, budget thorough.
Use composer-runner to run `npm test`, budget thorough.
Fan out wide-search + deep-search + runner for bug investigation.
